step_rationale: Immune response marker in atherosclerosis; reduced post-MI reflects systemic immune perturbation.
mechanism: IgA levels reflect adaptive immune activation in plaque inflammation and are altered post-MI.

references.title: Comprehensive Quality Analysis of Conventional and Novel Biomarkers in Diagnosing and Predicting Prognosis of Coronary Artery Disease, Acute Coronary Syndrome, and Heart Failure, a Comprehensive Literature Review.
Stroke and myocardial infarction induce neutrophil extracellular trap release disrupting lymphoid organ structure and immunoglobulin secretion.
Harnessing the Plasma Proteome to Mirror Current and Predict Future Cardiac Remodeling After Myocardial Infarction.
